title: The Capital Falls Into Chaos
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on the capital falls into chaos, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Capital Falls Into Chaos. The rebellion and royal army rush toward Alubarna as Vivi’s group searches for a way to stop the war before it starts. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Aghh, it's Smoker!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Zoro, why'd you save the enemy!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Shut up, I didn't want to!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Not like I give a damn if he dies.

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: Whatever, we need to quickly get a move on!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Army soldier
dialogue.text: We've lost quite a bit of time... Can we still make it, Vivil?

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: I don't know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nami, do you still have the perfume you bought at Namohana?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm? Yes, but why?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: tie, and the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Put some on right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Like this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: @Ehhh! 9'd follow your scent to even hell itself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Xo X

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Fine, then go to hell already. Seriously.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: RORO- Noa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What reason do you have for saving me?

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: Hey zero! Save him too!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: What!? He's our enemy! Just leave him be!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What!? He'll die if we leave him here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He can't swim, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah, I know... what i meant was that...

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: I was only following my captain's orders...

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: There's really no need for thanks.

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: It was just one of his whims. Don't think too much on it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You don't have any complaints if I arrested you right now...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: See what I mean! This is what happens when you rescue a marine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Straw-Eat Luffy is here!?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Yeah, and I also saw Smoker with him too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let's go back up the captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Gather the troops!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Alright! Full speed ahead to Alubanna!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oh, they finally woke up.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where's Croco- Dile!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Aghh! It's smoke! You want a piece of me too!?

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: Oh crap! Luffy, no! Let's just run away instead!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Army soldier
dialogue.text: Is this brat ever serious...?

summary: This part develops the capital falls into chaos and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
